executive_summary.architecture_type: FSD Strict Frontend + Domain-Driven Backend Clean Architecture

resolved_linter_warnings.nature: Cleanup function accessing mutable .current ref value in useEffect hook
resolved_linter_warnings.mitigation: Captured ref value to local constants inside effect to prevent memory leaks and standard React 19 warnings

resolved_linter_warnings.nature: Missing function dependency in useEffect hook due to raw declaration in body scope
resolved_linter_warnings.mitigation: Wrapped fetchLogs inside useCallback with proper [role] dependency array and updated hook targets

resolved_linter_warnings.nature: Spurious 'inventory' dependency listed in useCallback dependency array without usage
resolved_linter_warnings.mitigation: Removed unused inventory dependency to optimize callback lifecycle and prevent useless component re-evaluations

strong_points: Clean separation of concern under Clean Architecture backend structure which simplifies mock-based testing
Proper segregation of business intelligence and user-interface modules within well-defined FSD boundaries
Highly responsive state synchronization with robust sessionStorage-backed Zustand state stores

areas_for_expansion.description: Expose sourcing gap intelligence, live cyberpunk event streams, and real-time conversion graphics
Trigger automated customized outbound notifications for pre-qualified prospective buyers and high-intent leads
